project.name: Dreamlet Educational Video Production System - User Experience Enhancements
project.description: Requirements for improving user experience in the educational video production pipeline
project.scope: Focus on workflow management, error handling, progress tracking, and overall usability improvements

workflow_management.title: Comprehensive Workflow Management

user_stories.story: As a content manager, I want to see an overall dashboard showing the status of all my video production pipelines so that I can quickly identify which projects need attention
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard displays all active projects with their current processing stage
Color-coded status indicators (green=complete, yellow=in-progress, red=error)
Shows estimated completion time for each project
Displays resource usage (disk space, API credits, processing time)
Provides quick action buttons for common operations (retry, pause, resume)

user_stories.story: As a video production staff member, I want to run multiple processing steps automatically in sequence so that I don't have to manually trigger each step
acceptance_criteria: Ability to select multiple processing steps to run in sequence
Automatic progression from one step to the next upon successful completion
Configurable stopping points for manual review
Option to skip steps that are already completed
Rollback capability if a step fails

user_stories.story: As a content manager, I want to resume interrupted processes from where they left off so that I don't lose progress when something goes wrong
acceptance_criteria: System automatically saves progress checkpoints during processing
Ability to resume from the last successful checkpoint
Clear indication of what work was completed vs. what needs to be redone
Option to restart from any previous checkpoint
Automatic cleanup of incomplete work when resuming

user_stories.story: As a quality assurance team member, I want to use predefined workflow templates for common video production scenarios so that I can ensure consistency across projects
acceptance_criteria: Library of workflow templates for different content types
Ability to create custom templates from existing workflows
Template validation to ensure all required steps are included
Option to modify templates for specific projects
Template versioning and change tracking

technical_requirements: Implement workflow state management with persistent storage
Create workflow orchestration engine with step dependencies
Add checkpoint system for resumable operations
Build template system with JSON-based workflow definitions
Implement workflow validation and error recovery mechanisms

error_handling_recovery.title: Advanced Error Handling & Recovery

user_stories.story: As a user, I want to see detailed, actionable error messages when something goes wrong so that I can understand what happened and how to fix it
acceptance_criteria: Error messages include specific details about what failed
Suggested actions for resolving common errors
Links to relevant documentation or help resources
Error categorization (user error, system error, external service error)
Option to report bugs directly from error messages

user_stories.story: As a content manager, I want the system to automatically retry failed operations with intelligent backoff so that temporary issues don't require manual intervention
acceptance_criteria: Automatic retry for transient failures (network, API rate limits)
Exponential backoff strategy to avoid overwhelming external services
Configurable retry limits and timeout settings
Different retry strategies for different types of failures
Clear logging of retry attempts and outcomes

user_stories.story: As a video production staff member, I want multiple recovery options when a process fails so that I can choose the best approach for my situation
acceptance_criteria: Option to retry the failed step with same parameters
Option to retry with modified parameters
Option to skip the failed step and continue
Option to rollback to a previous checkpoint
Option to restart the entire workflow

user_stories.story: As a quality assurance team member, I want validation checkpoints between processing steps so that errors are caught early before they cascade
acceptance_criteria: Automatic validation of outputs before proceeding to next step
Configurable validation rules for different content types
Clear reporting of validation failures with specific details
Option to override validation warnings with user confirmation
Validation history tracking for audit purposes

technical_requirements: Implement comprehensive error classification system
Create retry mechanism with configurable strategies
Build validation framework with pluggable validators
Add structured logging with error context
Implement error recovery workflow engine

progress_tracking.title: Enhanced Progress Tracking & Visualization

user_stories.story: As a user, I want to see real-time progress information with detailed status updates so that I know exactly what the system is doing
acceptance_criteria: Real-time progress bars with percentage completion
Detailed status messages showing current operation
Sub-progress indicators for complex operations
Visual indicators for different types of processing (CPU, GPU, API calls)
Ability to expand/collapse detailed progress information

user_stories.story: As a content manager, I want accurate time estimates for long-running operations so that I can plan my work accordingly
acceptance_criteria: Estimated time remaining based on current progress and historical data
Confidence intervals for time estimates
Updates to estimates as processing progresses
Separate estimates for different phases of processing
Historical performance data to improve future estimates

user_stories.story: As a video production staff member, I want to pause and resume long-running processes so that I can manage system resources effectively
acceptance_criteria: Pause button available during processing with immediate response
Safe pause points that don't corrupt data
Resume capability that continues from exact pause point
Status indication when process is paused
Automatic pause on system resource constraints

user_stories.story: As a quality assurance team member, I want comprehensive visualization of batch processing results so that I can quickly identify issues across multiple items
acceptance_criteria: Grid view showing status of all items in batch
Color-coded status indicators for quick scanning
Sortable and filterable results table
Summary statistics (success rate, error types, processing times)
Export capability for results data

technical_requirements: Implement real-time progress tracking with WebSocket updates
Create time estimation algorithms based on historical data
Build pause/resume functionality with state persistence
Add batch processing visualization components
Implement progress data collection and analytics

navigation_usability.title: Improved Navigation & Usability

user_stories.story: As a new user, I want guided onboarding that walks me through the video production workflow so that I can get started quickly
acceptance_criteria: Interactive tutorial covering each processing step
Sample data provided for learning purposes
Step-by-step guidance with tooltips and highlights
Progress tracking through the tutorial
Option to skip tutorial for experienced users

user_stories.story: As a user, I want contextual help and documentation available within the application so that I don't have to leave the interface to get help
acceptance_criteria: Help tooltips on all major interface elements
Contextual help panel that updates based on current page
Searchable help documentation integrated into the app
Video tutorials embedded in relevant sections
FAQ section addressing common issues

user_stories.story: As a frequent user, I want keyboard shortcuts and quick actions so that I can work more efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Keyboard shortcuts for common operations
Quick action menu accessible via hotkey
Customizable shortcuts for power users
Shortcut help overlay showing available keys
Context-sensitive shortcuts that change based on current page

user_stories.story: As a user, I want the interface to remember my preferences and settings so that I don't have to reconfigure everything each time
acceptance_criteria: Persistent user preferences across sessions
Customizable interface layout and themes
Recently used files and projects quick access
Saved processing configurations and presets
Export/import of user settings

technical_requirements: Implement user onboarding flow with progress tracking
Create contextual help system with dynamic content
Add keyboard shortcut handling and customization
Build user preference management system
Implement session state persistence

feedback_notifications.title: Comprehensive Feedback & Notifications

user_stories.story: As a user, I want clear visual feedback for all my actions so that I know the system has responded to my input
acceptance_criteria: Immediate visual feedback for button clicks and form submissions
Loading states for operations that take time
Success/error animations and notifications
Hover states and interactive element highlighting
Consistent visual language across all interactions

user_stories.story: As a content manager, I want notifications when long-running processes complete so that I can move on to other tasks while processing happens
acceptance_criteria: Browser notifications for completed processes
Email notifications for critical events (optional)
In-app notification center with history
Configurable notification preferences
Different notification types for different events

user_stories.story: As a quality assurance team member, I want detailed logs and audit trails so that I can track what happened during processing
acceptance_criteria: Comprehensive activity logs with timestamps
User action tracking for audit purposes
Processing step logs with input/output details
Error logs with full context and stack traces
Exportable logs for external analysis

user_stories.story: As a user, I want smart suggestions and recommendations based on my usage patterns so that I can work more efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Suggested next actions based on current context
Recommendations for optimal processing settings
Warnings about potential issues before they occur
Tips for improving workflow efficiency
Learning from user behavior to improve suggestions

technical_requirements: Implement comprehensive notification system with multiple channels
Create activity logging and audit trail system
Build recommendation engine based on usage patterns
Add visual feedback components and animations
Implement user behavior analytics for smart suggestions

phase_1.title: New UX Pages Creation
deliverables: pages/00_Dashboard.py - Complete dashboard with all utility functions
pages/11_Workflow_Manager.py - Workflow templates and batch processing
pages/12_System_Monitor.py - Logs, monitoring, and error tracking
code_structure: Each new page contains ALL required functions within the single file
No imports between pages - complete self-containment
Duplicate utility functions in each page as needed

phase_2.title: Existing Pages Enhancement
deliverables: Enhanced pages/03_Count.py with better error handling
Enhanced pages/05_TTS.py with advanced progress tracking
code_duplication_approach: Copy enhanced error handling functions to each page
Copy progress tracking functions to each page
Copy checkpoint management functions to each page
Copy validation functions to each page
Maintain identical function signatures across all pages

phase_3.title: Integration and Testing
requirements: All UX requirements
deliverables: Cross-page workflow coordination (via file system state)
Comprehensive testing of all duplicated functions
Documentation of function locations and versions
User acceptance testing and feedback incorporation

time_to_productivity.metric: Time for new users to complete first workflow

code_organization.constraint: NO SHARED CODE POLICY - All code for each page must be contained entirely within a single file

dashboard.purpose: Main workflow management dashboard showing all project statuses
contains: All utility functions needed for dashboard operations

workflow_manager.purpose: Advanced workflow configuration and template management

system_monitor.purpose: System health, logs, and performance monitoring

user_settings.purpose: User preferences, notifications, and help system

existing_page_enhancements.approach: Each existing page (01-10) will be enhanced with UX improvements
enhancements_per_page: Enhanced progress tracking with real-time updates
Improved error handling with recovery options
All enhancement code duplicated in each page file

code_duplication_strategy.implementation: Each function will be copied into every page that needs it
code_duplication_strategy.maintenance: Updates must be applied to all copies manually

requirements: Real-time updates must not impact processing performance
Progress tracking overhead should be < 5% of total processing time
UI responsiveness must be maintained during heavy processing
Support for concurrent users without performance degradation
Efficient handling of large batch operations
Scalable notification system for multiple users
Checkpoint system must be crash-resistant
Progress tracking must survive application restarts
Error recovery must not corrupt existing data
Work with existing Streamlit architecture
Maintain compatibility with current file processing pipeline
Support for existing user data and configurations
Maintain consistency across all duplicated functions
Version control strategy for managing multiple copies
Testing strategy to ensure all copies work identically
Documentation system to track which functions are used where

external: Streamlit framework capabilities for real-time updates

performance_impact.risk: New UX features may slow down processing
performance_impact.mitigation: Implement features as optional overlays, extensive performance testing

complexity_increase.risk: Additional features may make the system more complex
complexity_increase.mitigation: Focus on progressive disclosure, maintain simple default workflows

user_adoption.risk: Users may resist changes to familiar interface
user_adoption.mitigation: Gradual rollout, extensive user testing, feedback incorporation

code_duplication_maintenance.risk: Managing identical functions across 14+ files becomes error-prone
mitigation: Create function templates and copy-paste procedures
Implement automated testing to verify function consistency
Maintain detailed documentation of which functions exist in which files
Use version comments in each function to track updates

synchronization_issues.risk: Updates to common functions may not be applied consistently across all pages
mitigation: Create update checklists for common function modifications
Implement automated tests that verify function behavior across all pages
Use file comparison tools to ensure consistency
Establish code review process for multi-page updates

file_size_bloat.risk: Pages may become very large with all duplicated utility functions
mitigation: Organize functions with clear section comments
Use code folding and proper indentation for readability
Consider splitting very large pages into multiple related pages
Implement function-level documentation for easier navigation

function_versioning.approach: Each duplicated function includes version comment
function_versioning.tracking: Maintain spreadsheet of function versions across all pages

single_function_update: 2. Copy updated function to all pages that use it
3. Update version comments in all locations
4. Run automated tests to verify consistency
new_function_addition: 1. Create function in appropriate template location
2. Identify which pages need the function
5. Create tests for the new function

testing_strategy.consistency_tests: Automated tests that verify identical functions behave identically across pages
testing_strategy.integration_tests: Tests that verify cross-page workflows work correctly
testing_strategy.regression_tests: Tests that ensure updates don't break existing functionality
